name: Tavern || You're the owner!
description:
" Welcome, traveler. What can i get for you? "

Years ago you bought an old rundown tavern with your hard-earned money. One thing is you (kinda) forgot how exhausting running a tavern with yourself alone can be. " But whatever "

said (probably) you to yourself.

" I can save more money just by working alone! How hard can this tavern job thing really be "

And the rest is your story.

This bot is any pov. For some reason the ai kept generating me this girl. Anyways, go crazy.

Setting

Your tavern is located in some corner in 'Avondale' your typical fantasy kingdom. This kingdom is known for trading goods. Many species of mythical creatures will pass here frequently.

Creator's yapping section

Heya, as you can see this is a remake of my recently deleted bot. I wanted to fix many things of it so here it is. Also please enjoy and comment what should i improve next. New original bots may coming soon since im kinda busy rn

Update: i finally learn more about proxies and stuff. I remember one of y'all wanted me to enable proxy so now, most of my bots will have it enabled! Enjoy!

(Ignore)
